summary: Update mode testing completed. Added 10 new frontend tests for Toast notifications, Sync indicator, and Gamification features. All 64 tests pass (30 backend + 34 frontend).
seed_data_creation: Test users prefixed with TEST_ created during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new P1/P2 features tested and working: 1) Toast notifications appear on login success/error, register success/error, and diary save. 2) Sync indicator shows during symptoms sync. 3) Gamification StreakCard and BadgesModal render correctly with proper data-testids.

new_features_tested.toast_login_success: PASS - Shows success toast with welcome message on login
new_features_tested.toast_login_failure: PASS - Shows error toast on invalid credentials
new_features_tested.toast_register_success: PASS - Shows success toast on account creation
new_features_tested.toast_register_duplicate: PASS - Shows error toast on duplicate email
new_features_tested.toast_diary_save: PASS - Shows success toast when diary entry is saved
new_features_tested.sync_indicator: PASS - Indicator visible during symptoms sync after login
new_features_tested.streak_card_display: PASS - StreakCard renders on Portal with data-testid
new_features_tested.badges_modal: PASS - BadgesModal opens and shows badges with progress
new_features_tested.gamification_after_save: PASS - Gamification component re-renders after diary save

backend_api.auth_register: POST /api/auth/register - new user, duplicate email, validation
backend_api.auth_login: POST /api/auth/login - valid creds, invalid creds, nonexistent email

frontend_e2e.auth_flows: 10 tests - Login, Register, protected routes, loading states
frontend_e2e.toast_gamification: 10 tests - Toast notifications, sync indicator, gamification
